task_description: download the RSS feed for Reddit programming and print the first five item titles
code:
import feedparser
rss_url = "https://www.reddit.com/r/programming/.rss"
feed = feedparser.parse(rss_url)
print(feed.entries[5].title)

import feedparser
rss_url = "https://www.reddit.com/r/programming/.rss"
